coefficient_status: c1_color_exact; c2_c3_from MSR/pole series literature; c4_from Marquard_top_MSbar_on-shell_alpha_s^4 coefficient converted to alpha/(4pi) normalization

sources.c1_c2_c3: Butenschoen et al. top MC calibration / MSR definition, c1=5.333,c2=131.785,c3=4699.703 in alpha_s/(4pi) normalization
sources.c4: Marquard et al. four-loop MS-on-shell top relation, coefficient (8.615 +/- 0.017) alpha_s^4, converted to alpha_s/(4pi)^4 normalization
sources.alpha_running: QCD beta coefficients through beta3, nf=5, integrated numerically

forbidden: Do not alter coefficients or loop order using PDG/direct top agreement.
